title: A Dark Song
review: It's kind of beautiful, mostly when they're outdoors. But unfortunately the characters have decided to lock themselves inside and punish themselves in a nasty way. There isn't much noticeable music until the final act, which works well here. It's light on horror but high on intrigue. Like every film that reveals the real horror near the end, I wish they went about twice as hard with it. But that's just me. I hope there will one day be a film that looks very cheap right until the final scene, where there will be an extremely high budget trip to hell.
